footnote_legend.text: Weighted average based on fair value as of December 31, 2025.

Represents a PIK interest security. At the option of the issuer, interest can be paid in cash or cash and PIK interest. The percentage of PIK interest shown is the maximum PIK interest that can be elected by the issue.
Investment has been on non-accrual since August 21, 2024.

Included in this investment is an unfunded equity commitment amount of $ 74,849 . ​ Abbreviation Legend PIK — Payment-In-Kind SOFR — Secured Overnight Financing Rate ​ ​ The accompanying notes are an integral part of the
The primary significant unobservable input used in the fair value measurement of the Company’s equity investments is the EBITDA multiple
